zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Eccleshall於1312年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德時，她的父親Robert de Eccleshall26歲，母親Mrs. Robert de Eccleshall27歲。她和John Staunton至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1340年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年28歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Eccleshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eccleshall (Staffs), Ecclesall (WR Yorks) or Eccleshill (Lancs, WR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Eccleshall was born in 1312, in Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Eccleshall, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. Robert de Eccleshall, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with John Staunton. She died in 1340, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28, and was buried in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Eccleshall est née en 1312, à Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert d’Eccleshall, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert d’Eccleshall, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec John Staunton. Elle est décédée en 1340, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Eccleshall 1312 in Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Eccleshall 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Robert de Eccleshall 27. Sie hatte mit John Staunton mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1340 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con John Staunton. Morì nel 1340, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Eccleshallが1312年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアスタウントン ハロルドで生まれた時，父Robert de Eccleshallは26歳，母Mrs. Robert de Eccleshallは27歳であった。彼女はJohn Stauntonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1340年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで28歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Eccleshall(이)가 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 스타운턴 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Eccleshall(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert de Eccleshall(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 John Staunton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Eccleshall родилась в 1312 г. в местности стаунтон харолд, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Eccleshall было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert de Eccleshall, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от John Staunton. Она умерла в 1340 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
